race.comment: KORITSI (10) starting to hit her straps after she got off the mark at start nine with a tough on-pace victory over 1262m at this track. Chad Lever retains the ride and she gets an even better set-up with the weight drop. Can win again. MANE CHARACTER (7) got her Maiden win out of the way first-up, then failed to close off when eighth over 1350m at Wyong. Comes back in class and look for her late. SUGARFIRE (8) only the one win from fifteen starts and unlucky not to have a few more wins on the CV. Taken back from the draw and savaged the line late when third over 1500m at Muswellbrook. Top-four contender. ROCKBARTON MARSHAL (2) bounced off his good debut second, with a strong on-pace win over 1200m at Port Macquarie. Tricky gate today and can sneak into the minor money. The chances don't end there.
